languages.text:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}. It is spent on Eogunn's unique abilities, like {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Every stack increases all Shock and Energy damage dealt by Eogunn by {uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

traits.locale_text:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}. It is spent on Eogunn's unique abilities, like {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Every stack increases all Shock and Energy damage dealt by Eogunn by {uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

languages.text:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
These stacks are used to activate Eogunn's unique abilities, such as {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Each stack increases all energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn by +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.
languages.original_text:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains 1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}. It is spent on Eogunn's unique abilities, like {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Every stack increases all Shock and Energy damage dealt by Eogunn by {uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

traits.locale_text:
When Eogunn attacks enemies, he gains <u>(3 + number of ferrum sanctum stacks on the target)</u> stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}. These stacks allow the use of special abilities, but are removed afterwards.
Each time Eogunn gains stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} this way, he inflicts 1 stack of {g|f:2276158ed72a40d8a0e68c38f283794a}lost energy{/g} on each enemy attacked. Enemies affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} can suffer up to 6 stacks, and enemies that are not affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} can suffer up to 3 stacks.
Attacks with a magnarail lances and transonic cannons do not grant stacks.

For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
These stacks are used to activate Eogunn's unique abilities, such as {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Each stack increases all energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn by +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
These stacks are used to activate Eogunn's unique abilities, such as {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Each stack increases all energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn by +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

When Eogunn attacks enemies, he gains {uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}. These stacks allow the use of special abilities, but are removed afterwards.
Each time Eogunn gains stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} this way, he inflicts +1 stack of {g|f:2276158ed72a40d8a0e68c38f283794a}lost energy{/g} on each enemy attacked. Enemies affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} can suffer up to +6 stacks, and enemies that are not affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} can suffer up to +3 stacks.
Attacks with magnarail lances and transonic cannons do not grant stacks.

When Eogunn attacks enemies, he gains {uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}. These stacks allow the use of special abilities, but are removed afterwards.
Each time Eogunn gains stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} this way, he inflicts +1 stack of {g|f:2276158ed72a40d8a0e68c38f283794a}lost energy{/g} on each enemy attacked. Enemies affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} can suffer up to +6 stacks, and enemies that are not affected by {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} can suffer up to +3 stacks.
Attacks with magnarail lances and transonic cannons do not grant stacks.

languages.text:
За каждое потраченное очко действия Эоганн получает +1 уровень {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}.
Эти уровни позволяют использовать особые способности Эоганна, такие как {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Гальваническое поле{/g}.
Каждый уровень увеличивает весь энергетический и электрический урон Эоганна на +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%
languages.original_text:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
These stacks are used to activate Eogunn's unique abilities, such as {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Each stack increases all energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn by +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

traits.locale_text:
Когда Эоганн атакует противников, он получает {uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Эти уровни позволяют использовать особые способности, но снимаются после их применения.
Каждый раз, когда Эоганн получает уровни {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g} таким образом, он накладывает +1 уровень {g|f:2276158ed72a40d8a0e68c38f283794a}потерянной энергии{/g} на каждого атакованного противника. Противники под эффектом {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Феррум Санктум{/g} могут получить до +6 уровней, а противники без этого эффекта — до +3 уровней.
Атаки магнарельсовыми копьями и трансзвуковыми пушками не дают уровни.

За каждое потраченное очко действия Эоганн получает +1 уровень {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}.
Эти уровни позволяют использовать особые способности Эоганна, такие как {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Гальваническое поле{/g}.
Каждый уровень увеличивает весь энергетический и электрический урон Эоганна на +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%

За каждое потраченное очко действия Эоганн получает +1 уровень {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}.
Эти уровни позволяют использовать особые способности Эоганна, такие как {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Гальваническое поле{/g}.
Каждый уровень увеличивает весь энергетический и электрический урон Эоганна на +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%

languages.text:
Por cada 1 PA gastado, Eogunn obtiene +1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}.
Estas acumulaciones sirven para activar las capacidades únicas de Eogunn, como {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Campo galvánico{/g}.
Cada acumulación aumenta el daño de energía y conmoción que inflija Eogunn un +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} %.
languages.original_text:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
These stacks are used to activate Eogunn's unique abilities, such as {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Each stack increases all energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn by +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

traits.locale_text:
Por cada 1 PA gastado, Eogunn obtiene +1 acumulación de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}.
Estas acumulaciones sirven para activar las capacidades únicas de Eogunn, como {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Campo galvánico{/g}.
Cada acumulación aumenta el daño de energía y conmoción que inflija Eogunn un +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} %.

Cuando Eogunn ataca a los enemigos, obtiene {uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}. Estas acumulaciones permiten usar capacidades especiales, pero se eliminan al hacerlo.
Cada vez que Eogunn gana acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g} de este modo, inflige +1 acumulación de {g|f:2276158ed72a40d8a0e68c38f283794a}pérdida de energía{/g} a cada enemigo al que ataque. Los enemigos afectados por {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} pueden sufrir hasta +6 acumulaciones, mientras que los que no están afectados por {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}ferrum sanctum{/g} pueden sufrir hasta +3.
Los ataques con una lanza magnaaceleradora o un cañón transónico no aplican acumulaciones.

languages.text:
Für jeweils 1 investierten AP erhält Eogunn +1 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}.
Diese Stapel dienen der Aktivierung von Eogunns einzigartigen Aktivitäten wie {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanisches Feld{/g}.
Jeder Stapel erhöht den von Eogunn verursachten Energie- und Schockschaden um +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} %.
languages.original_text:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
These stacks are used to activate Eogunn's unique abilities, such as {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Each stack increases all energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn by +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

traits.locale_text:
Für jeweils 1 investierten AP erhält Eogunn +1 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}.
Diese Stapel dienen der Aktivierung von Eogunns einzigartigen Aktivitäten wie {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanisches Feld{/g}.
Jeder Stapel erhöht den von Eogunn verursachten Energie- und Schockschaden um +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} %.

Greift Eogunn Gegner an, erhält er {uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}. Diese Stapel ermöglichen den Einsatz von Spezialfähigkeiten, werden danach aber entfernt.
Erhält Eogunn auf diese Weise {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}-Stapel, belegt er jeden attackierten Gegner mit +1 Stapel {g|f:2276158ed72a40d8a0e68c38f283794a}Verlorene Energie{/g}. Mit {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g} belegte Gegner können mit bis zu +6 Stapeln belegt werden. Nicht mit {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g} belegte Gegner können bis zu +3 Stapel erhalten.
Angriffe mit Magnabeschleunigerlanzen und Transschallkanonen gewähren keine Stapel.

languages.text:
Pour chaque PA dépensé, Eogunn gagne +1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}.
Ces cumuls permettent d'activer les capacités propres à Eogunn, comme {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Champ galvanique{/g}.
Chaque cumul augmente les dégâts d'énergie et d'électrocution infligés par Eogunn de +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} %.
languages.original_text:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
These stacks are used to activate Eogunn's unique abilities, such as {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Each stack increases all energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn by +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

traits.locale_text:
Pour chaque PA dépensé, Eogunn gagne +1 cumul d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}.
Ces cumuls permettent d'activer les capacités propres à Eogunn, comme {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Champ galvanique{/g}.
Chaque cumul augmente les dégâts d'énergie et d'électrocution infligés par Eogunn de +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} %.

Quand Eogunn attaque des ennemis, il gagne {uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}. Ces cumuls permettent d'utiliser des capacités spéciales, mais sont supprimés ensuite.
Chaque fois qu'Eogunn gagne des cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g} de cette manière, il inflige +1 cumul d'{g|f:2276158ed72a40d8a0e68c38f283794a}Énergie perdue{/g} à chaque ennemi attaqué. Les ennemis sous l'effet de {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} peuvent recevoir jusqu'à 6 cumuls (3 pour les autres).
Les attaques à la lance magnarail et au canon transsonique ne donnent pas de cumuls.

languages.text:
Eogunn, harcanan her 1 EP için +1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazanır.
Bu birikimler, Eogunn'un {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanik Alan{/g} gibi eşsiz kabiliyetlerini etkinleştirmekte kullanılır.
Her bir birikim, Eogunn'un verdiği tüm enerji ve şok hasarını +%{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} artırır.
languages.original_text:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
These stacks are used to activate Eogunn's unique abilities, such as {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Each stack increases all energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn by +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

traits.locale_text:
Eogunn, harcanan her 1 EP için +1 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazanır.
Bu birikimler, Eogunn'un {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanik Alan{/g} gibi eşsiz kabiliyetlerini etkinleştirmekte kullanılır.
Her bir birikim, Eogunn'un verdiği tüm enerji ve şok hasarını +%{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} artırır.

Eogunn, düşmanlara saldırdığında {uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47} {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazanır. Bu birikimler, özel kabiliyetlerin kullanımına olanak tanırlar ancak kullanım ardından ortadan kalkarlar.
Eogunn, bu yolla her {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi kazandığında saldırdığı her bir düşmanda +1 {g|f:2276158ed72a40d8a0e68c38f283794a}yitik enerji{/g} birikimi oluşturur. {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Demir kutak{/g} etkisindeki düşmanlar en fazla +6 birikime maruz kalabilirken {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}demir kutak{/g} etkisinde olmayan düşmanlar ise en fazla +3 birikime maruz kalabilir.
Magnaray mızrağı ve transonik top ile yapılan saldırılar, birikim kazandırmaz.

languages.text:
每消耗1点行动点数，伊奥贡获得1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。
这些层数可用于发动伊奥贡的专属能力，如{g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}电激力场{/g}。
每层势能使伊奥贡造成的所有能量和电击伤害提高{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%。
languages.original_text:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
These stacks are used to activate Eogunn's unique abilities, such as {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Each stack increases all energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn by +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

traits.locale_text:
每消耗1点行动点数，伊奥贡获得1层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。
这些层数可用于发动伊奥贡的专属能力，如{g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}电激力场{/g}。
每层势能使伊奥贡造成的所有能量和电击伤害提高{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%。

伊奥贡攻击敌人时，获得{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}。这些层数可用于施展特殊能力，但会在使用后被移除。
每当伊奥贡以此方式获得{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}层数，便会对每个被攻击的敌人施加1层{g|f:2276158ed72a40d8a0e68c38f283794a}能量流失{/g}。受{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}影响的敌人最多可叠加6层能量流失，未受{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}影响的敌人最多可叠加3层能量流失。
磁轨长矛和穿梭音波炮攻击不会获得层数。

languages.text:
1AP消費するごとに、エオガンは{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}を+1スタック得る。
これらのスタックは、{g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}ガルヴァニック・フィールド{/g}などエオガン固有のアビリティを発動するために使用される。
各スタックは、エオガンが与えるすべてのエネルギーおよびショックダメージを+{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%増加させる。
languages.original_text:
For every 1 AP spent, Eogunn gains +1 stack of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}.
These stacks are used to activate Eogunn's unique abilities, such as {g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}Galvanic Field{/g}.
Each stack increases all energy and shock damage dealt by Eogunn by +{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%.

traits.locale_text:
1AP消費するごとに、エオガンは{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}を+1スタック得る。
これらのスタックは、{g|f:823b70d6ab9349b2a1e2b1bbbe4798e2}ガルヴァニック・フィールド{/g}などエオガン固有のアビリティを発動するために使用される。
各スタックは、エオガンが与えるすべてのエネルギーおよびショックダメージを+{uip|DamageBonus|eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}%増加させる。
